{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/obsidian/habr-unique-projects/deep-pairs/README.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

----
title: "deep-pairs"
tags:
  * habr-unique-projects
date: 2026-04-29
----

h1. deep-pairs

_Файлов:_ 8

h2. Содержание

* [[1-llm-gateway|1-llm-gateway.md]] — 
* [[2-document-rag|2-document-rag.md]] — 
* [[3-adversarial-multi-ide|3-adversarial-multi-ide.md]] — 
* [[4-skill-catalogs-subagents|4-skill-catalogs-subagents.md]] — 
* [[5-voice-local-memory|5-voice-local-memory.md]] — 
* [[6-tmux-village-openclaw|6-tmux-village-openclaw.md]] — 
* [[7-autoresearch-distributed|7-autoresearch-distributed.md]] — 
* [[8-self-aware-mcp-specs|8-self-aware-mcp-specs.md]] — 



----

_Похожие документы:_
* [[README]] (сходство 0.17)
* [[README]] (сходство 0.15)
* [[README]] (сходство 0.14)
